actions.name: Comatose
actions.description: Effect: The user has a 50% chance of being cured of 1 @Trait[major-affliction] at the end of their Activations, the oldest Afflictions being cured first.. The user is always considered to be affected by the @Affliction[drowsy] Affliction for the application of attack and Ability effects. The user ignores the effects of the @Affliction[drowsy] Affliction.
